testcase.name: testUpload_success
testcase.system-out:
2026-04-09T21:36:54.134+05:30 INFO 18252 --- [pdf-manager] [ main] c.pdfmanager.controller.PdfController : Upload request — file='test.pdf', size=113 Hibernate: insert into pdf_documents (content_type, description, file_data, file_name, file_path, file_size, last_accessed_at, uploaded_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-04-09T21:36:54.150+05:30 INFO 18252 --- [pdf-manager] [ main] com.pdfmanager.service.PdfService : PDF saved — id=2, name=test.pdf, strategy=DB

Async: Async started = false Async result = null
Resolved Exception: Type = null
ModelAndView: View name = null View = null Model = null
FlashMap: Attributes = null
MockHttpServletResponse: Status = 201 Error message = null Headers = [Content-Type:"application/json"] Content type = application/json Body = {"success":true,"message":"PDF uploaded successfully.","data":{"id":2,"fileName":"test.pdf","contentType":"application/pdf","fileSize":113,"description":null,"uploadedAt":"2026-04-09T21:36:54.1467067","downloadUrl":"/api/v1/pdfs/2/download","viewUrl":"/api/v1/pdfs/2/view"}} Forwarded URL = null Redirected URL = null Cookies = []

testcase.name: testList
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select pd1_0.id, pd1_0.file_name, pd1_0.content_type, pd1_0.file_size, null, pd1_0.file_path, pd1_0.description, pd1_0.uploaded_at, pd1_0.last_accessed_at from pdf_documents pd1_0 order by pd1_0.uploaded_at desc

testcase.name: testUploadThenDownload
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-09T21:36:54.269+05:30 INFO 18252 --- [pdf-manager] [ main] c.pdfmanager.controller.PdfController : Upload request — file='download-test.pdf', size=113 Hibernate: insert into pdf_documents (content_type, description, file_data, file_name, file_path, file_size, last_accessed_at, uploaded_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-04-09T21:36:54.288+05:30 INFO 18252 --- [pdf-manager] [ main] com.pdfmanager.service.PdfService : PDF saved — id=3, name=download-test.pdf, strategy=DB 2026-04-09T21:36:54.299+05:30 INFO 18252 --- [pdf-manager] [ main] c.pdfmanager.controller.PdfController : Download request — id=3 Hibernate: select pd1_0.id, pd1_0.file_name, pd1_0.content_type, pd1_0.file_size, null, pd1_0.file_path, pd1_0.description, pd1_0.uploaded_at, pd1_0.last_accessed_at from pdf_documents pd1_0 where pd1_0.id=? Hibernate: select pd1_0.id, pd1_0.content_type, pd1_0.description, pd1_0.file_data, pd1_0.file_name, pd1_0.file_path, pd1_0.file_size, pd1_0.last_accessed_at, pd1_0.uploaded_at from pdf_documents pd1_0 where pd1_0.id=? Hibernate: update pdf_documents set last_accessed_at=? where id=?

testcase.name: testGet_notFound

testcase.name: testUpload_invalidFile
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-09T21:36:54.499+05:30 INFO 18252 --- [pdf-manager] [ main] c.pdfmanager.controller.PdfController : Upload request — file='not-a-pdf.txt', size=11 2026-04-09T21:36:54.513+05:30 WARN 18252 --- [pdf-manager] [ main] c.p.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Invalid PDF: Only PDF files are accepted. Detected type: text/plain
